message:
Commit before notifying to prevent data loss

Reorder workflow steps so changelog data is committed before Discord
notifications are attempted. Previously, a notification failure would
abort the job and lose the synced data even though rsync succeeded.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -108,6 +108,19 @@ jobs:
             done
           done
 
+      - name: Stage changes
+        run: git add .
+
+      - name: Commit changes
+        uses: planetscale/ghcommit-action@v0.2.0
+        with:
+          commit_message: "Sync changelog from tenzir/${{ inputs.project }}@${{ steps.clone.outputs.sha }}"
+          repo: ${{ github.repository }}
+          branch: ${{ github.ref_name }}
+          empty: false
+        env:
+          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token }}
+
       - name: Set up Python
         if: env.DISCORD_CHANGELOG_WEBHOOK != '' || env.DISCORD_RELEASE_WEBHOOK != ''
         uses: actions/setup-python@v5
@@ -153,19 +166,6 @@ jobs:
             sleep 1  # Rate limiting
           done < /tmp/new-releases.txt
 
-      - name: Stage changes
-        run: git add .
-

-        env:
-          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token }}
-
       - name: Trigger docs rebuild
         env:
           GH_TOKEN: ${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token }}
